topic: The mother-baby cell exchange that lasts forever
caption: Did you know that during pregnancy, cells are exchanged between mom and baby? 🤰🏼👶 This exchange, called microchimerism, can have lasting effects on both mom's and baby's health. 💡 Research shows that these exchanged cells can influence immune function, disease risk, and even brain development. 🧬👀 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who's expecting or a new mom. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health insights. Don't forget — this cell exchange is a lifelong bond! 💕 #microchimerism #motherbaby #cellsexchange #pregnancy #health
